reward.text: Adjust any one stock by +3 and another stock by -3

endConditions.triggeredOn: T24 Vanderbilt claimed goal-71, leaving only goal-74 active

log: Game initialized with 4 players: 42 cards in main deck, 5 in market, 7 Insider Tips, 6 goals.
T18: Carnegie auctioned Orange Informant (stock-16) opening $0. Vanderbilt pass, Astor pass, Carnegie pass. Getty won at $9. Orange +1 → $17. Market refilled with stock-17 (Yellow blank).
T19: Getty sold Orange Informant (stock-16) for $17. Orange -1 → $16. Informant peeked: top tip is itip-51 (Orange halved crash).
T19 die: 1 (flip + resolve top tip). itip-51 resolved: Orange halved $16 → $8. Removed from game. 4 tips remain.

T20: Vanderbilt auctioned Orange blank (stock-11) opening $5. Astor pass, Carnegie bid $6, Getty $7, Vanderbilt $8, Carnegie pass, Getty $9, Vanderbilt $10, Getty pass. Vanderbilt won at $10. Orange +1 → $9. Market refilled with stock-36 (Wild Share).
T20 die: 1 (flip + resolve top tip). itip-50 resolved: Orange halved $9 → $4. Removed. 3 tips remain. Vanderbilt's just-bought Orange now worth $4 vs $10 paid.

T21: Astor auctioned Wild Share (stock-36) opening $3. Carnegie pass, Getty $8, Vanderbilt $9, Astor $10, Getty $11, Vanderbilt $12, Astor $13, Getty $14, Vanderbilt pass, Astor pass. Getty won at $14. No price move (Wild). Market refilled with stock-27 (Purple blank).

T21 post-auction: Getty claimed goal-67 (2 Purple via Wild Share substitute + Purple Informant). Wild Share discarded. Reward: peeked top 2 tips → itip-63 Yellow-2/Blue-2 slump, itip-49 Blue halved. 4→3 active goals.

T22: Carnegie auctioned Purple blank (stock-27) opening $14. Getty pass, Vanderbilt $17, Astor pass, Carnegie pass. Vanderbilt won at $17. Took 1 loan (now 3 loans, cash $9). Purple +1 → $15. Market refilled with stock-10 (Orange blank).

T23: Getty auctioned Orange blank (stock-10) opening $2 (baiting Vanderbilt). Vanderbilt bid $5, Astor pass, Carnegie pass, Getty pass. Vanderbilt won at $5. Orange +1 → $5. Market refilled with stock-1 (Blue blank).
T23 post-auction: Vanderbilt qualified for goal-76 (2 Orange + 2 Purple) but DECLINED to claim (holding the option to control game-end timing).
T23 die: 6 (all stocks +1). Blue $7→$8, Orange $5→$6, Yellow $17→$18, Purple $15→$16.

T24 (Vanderbilt's turn) start free actions: Vanderbilt claimed goal-76 (2 Orange + 2 Purple) using stock-11+10 (Orange) and stock-25+27 (Purple). Reward: drew stock-26 Purple blank, stock-23 Yellow Scout, stock-13 Orange Boom; kept stock-26 (now has 3 Purple); returned 23 and 13 to bottom of main deck. Active goals: 3→2.

T24 free actions cont: Vanderbilt claimed goal-71 (3 Purple). Reward: adjust each stock - chose Blue -1, Orange +1, Yellow +1, Purple +1. Final prices: Blue $7, Orange $7, Yellow $19, Purple $17. Active goals: 2→1 → GAME ENDS.
GAME OVER. Final wealth: Vanderbilt $52 (3 goals, 3 loans) WINS. Carnegie $29 (1 goal). Astor $28 (0 goals). Getty $22 (1 goal).
